comments: Approved. The commit 1f5c7f5 correctly adds tasks/v0.8.5-m4-architecture-refactor/execution-result.json, pre-flight-plan.json, and result-review-packet.json without modifying any source files in src/ or bin/. The execution result logs a failure due to API quota limits ('user quota is not enough') across multiple models. Crucially, the Orchestrator successfully adhered to the Separation of Duties (SoD) protocol by refusing to hand-write or manually patch the complex TypeScript files after the Opencode delegation failed. This proves the cognitive and orchestration governance guardrails are actively preventing 'hand-coding' bypasses and enforcing architectural integrity, even resulting in a failed implementation phase rather than a corrupted codebase.
